title: Funny or awkward situations
wikitext:
[]: Funny or awkward situations             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Sep 18, 2009 3:09 am What kind of funny or awkward situations could you think of involving characters? Rei and Asuka are in the elevator scene with the super long pause, then someone breaks wind. They both glance back and forth between each other. Shinji, Asuka, Misato, and Pen-Pen get hammered before Rei, Toji, Hikari, and Kensuke come over in the synching dance episode. Everyone sits on the couch while watching Shinji, Asuka, and Misato dance around the mat while acting drunk. Hikari picks up Pen-Pen who then pukes in her lap. Shinji is doing his "business" in EoE in the hospital room when Misato comes in to check on Asuka. Shinji forgets to lock the door and Misato opens it. She sees the whole thing and is speechless. Shinji doesn't notice her though. Shinji says,"I'm so fucked up", then turns around and sees Misato. They stare each other for 15 seconds, then Misato says, "DAMN RIGHT YOU ARE!!!" Any other funny ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Sep 18, 2009 10:08 am I love to make up absurd lines for the Angels. I was watching Episode 10 last night and as Sandalphon hatches and latches onto Unit 02, I came out with :: Little kid voice:: "Is oo my mommy? Oo don' taste wike my mommy. Oo tastes wike Wiwiff (Lilith)! RAAAHH!!!!" Remiel = Angel opera singer Sachiel is the most fun to create fake subtitles for. When he cocks his head and eyes the UN aircraft buzzing around his head: "Huh? Whut're dese?" Then after the UN drops the N2 mine and the smoke clears and we see Sachiel with his face banged up, but otherwise unharmed: "Uuuugh, I gotta splitting headache. Anyone got a hundred kilos of aspirin??"

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sat Sep 19, 2009 12:33 am Somehow, I've always imagined Sachiel communing entirely in lolspeak...

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Sep 19, 2009 2:24 am Teague wrote: Somehow, I've always imagined Sachiel communing entirely in lolspeak...

[]:             Quote Post by Susuma » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:58 pm Still can't get over when Toji was hanging onto Shinji's shoulders ... so awkward ...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:04 pm Honestly, the only awkward situation I ever can come up with is a pretty realistic continuation of the dub dialogue: Toji "You'll do anything to get what you want, won't you?" Kensuke nods, grinning like the little pussy he is. Unnamed male starts beating the shit out of the little creeps who are talking in the bathroom and clearly exchanging sexual favors.

[]:             Quote Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:14 pm Rei and Shinji are in the train talking to one and other about Gendo and trying to understand him when train conductor comes in and asks for tickets Shamshell senses Eva 01 closing in and begins combat position and ends up braking its back

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:17 pm When Misato does the head grabbing thing at dinner table to Shinji, she falls face first into the table causing it to snap in half and injuring herself. Shinji just stares speechless for a long time. edit: Oh, when Rei slaps Shinji, Shinji proceeds to push her down the escalator.

[]:             Quote Post by Susuma » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:17 pm Legendary wrote: Honestly, the only awkward situation I ever can come up with is a pretty realistic continuation of the dub dialogue: Toji "You'll do anything to get what you want, won't you?" Kensuke nods, grinning like the little pussy he is. Unnamed male starts beating the shit out of the little creeps who are talking in the bathroom and clearly exchanging sexual favors.

[]:             Quote Post by Susuma » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:20 pm When Rei's like, 'I think I might be the third ...' and Shinji's like, ' lolwut. ' Every scene with Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:22 pm backseatjesus wrote: edit: Oh, when Rei slaps Shinji, Shinji proceeds to push her down the escalator.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:35 pm Susuma wrote: Every scene with Kaworu.
